company.name: AgentsOX
company.purpose: AgentsOX builds custom AI systems for real business operations.
company.positioning: Founder-led, technical, premium, practical, and calm. The work starts from the client's real problem, not from a fixed product.
company.promise: We listen, clarify the workflow, build the simplest useful system, and stay close until the client trusts the result.
company.symbolMeaning: The ox represents strength, resilience, and business systems that keep working under pressure.

services.name: AI chatbots
services.description: Customer-facing or internal chat systems that answer questions, collect context, and route work to the right next step.

services.name: Workflow automations
services.description: Automations for repetitive admin, follow-up, lead handling, scheduling, CRM updates, reporting, and internal handoffs.

services.name: Business analytics
services.description: Dashboards and reporting flows that help owners understand operations, leads, performance, and missed opportunities.

services.name: Business optimization
services.description: Practical technical improvements that reduce manual work, improve response time, and make daily operations easier to trust.

process: Clarify one business problem and the current workflow.
Map the tools, data, people, failure points, and handoff points.
Define the smallest useful automation or AI system to ship first.
Build a working pilot with review, handoff, and failure behavior.
Improve the system until the client feels safe using it.
trustPrinciples: Human control stays part of important workflows.
The system should be easy to understand and maintain.
No generic AI hype. The solution must fit the client's business.
Privacy, access, and data handling are discussed before implementation.
If a fixed product is not the right fit, AgentsOX builds around the actual need.

faq.question: What is AgentsOX?
faq.answer: AgentsOX is a founder-led AI and automation agency that builds custom systems for real business operations. We do not sell one fixed product. We listen to the workflow, clarify the problem, and build around the client's actual need.

faq.question: What can AgentsOX build?
faq.answer: We build AI chatbots, workflow automations, lead intake systems, follow-up flows, analytics dashboards, CRM improvements, and practical systems around legacy or messy business processes.

faq.question: Who do you help?
faq.answer: We help small business owners, clinics, MedSpas, real-estate offices, coaches, e-commerce stores, local service businesses, freelancers, and non-technical teams that need practical technical systems.

faq.question: Do you sell a fixed product?
faq.answer: No. AgentsOX builds custom solutions per client need. We may reuse proven patterns, but the system is shaped around the client's workflow, tools, risk, and business goal.

faq.question: How does the process work?
faq.answer: We start with one business problem, map the current workflow, identify the smallest useful system to ship first, build a pilot, and refine it until the client trusts the workflow.

faq.question: Can you work with non-technical businesses?
faq.answer: Yes. AgentsOX is built for businesses that do not want to manage technical complexity. We explain the system clearly, keep the workflow practical, and avoid unnecessary jargon.

faq.question: Is AI reliable enough for business workflows?
faq.answer: AI can be useful when it is bounded, reviewed, and connected to clear fallback behavior. We avoid blind automation for sensitive steps and define where humans stay in control.

faq.question: What about privacy and data?
faq.answer: Privacy and access are part of discovery. We identify what data is needed, what should not be exposed, who can access the system, and which integrations are appropriate before implementation.

faq.question: How much does it cost?
faq.answer: Pricing depends on the workflow, integrations, complexity, and support needed. AgentsOX can start with a focused pilot or build a larger custom system after discovery.

faq.question: What happens after I send the workflow?
faq.answer: AgentsOX reviews the workflow brief, clarifies the current tools and failure points, then suggests the simplest useful system or automation to build first.

answerBoundaries: Do not promise exact pricing before discovery.
Do not promise exact delivery timelines before discovery.
Do not claim a specific integration is guaranteed before checking access and API limits.
Do not say AI will replace the client's team.
Do not overuse AI jargon or generic hype.
